channel.title: We Work Remotely: Remote Jobs
channel.description: Remote Jobs at We Work Remotely

item.title: Full-Stack Engineer at Basecamp
item.description: Basecamp is looking for a Full-Stack Engineer. You will work with Ruby on Rails and React. 4+ years of experience required. Fully remote position.

item.title: Senior Backend Developer at Shopify
item.description: Shopify needs a Senior Backend Developer with strong Go or Ruby experience. You will build scalable e-commerce infrastructure. Remote worldwide.

item.title: iOS Engineer at Buffer
item.description: Buffer is hiring an iOS Engineer. Swift experience is required, with 3+ years mobile development background. Async-first remote team.
